goal_text:
You want to find a 'hospital' in town. The hospital should have the 'hepatobillary and gastrointestinal surgery regional referral centre' department.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

info.department: hepatobillary and gastrointestinal surgery regional referral centre

message: You want to find a hospital in town. The hospital should have the hepatobillary and gastrointestinal surgery regional referral centre department
